text: Bitcoin is holding steady near $62.6k with modest gains, while Ethereum is outpacing it slightly at +1.0%, suggesting some appetite for altcoin exposure despite the overall mood. The Fear & Greed index sits at 17—extreme fear territory—and has deteriorated further over the past week, indicating capitulation sentiment and possible capitulation selling. With Bitcoin dominance at 56.2% and total volume at $61B, the market is showing low conviction: money isn't rushing in to establish fresh longs, nor is it panicking into stablecoins at scale.
